articles.author: Lauren Weber, Lena H. Sun, Victoria Craw
articles.title: Why health officials say the hantavirus cruise outbreak is not the next pandemic - The Washington Post
articles.description: Experts say that because this strain of hantavirus typically requires prolonged or intimate contact, it is not as contagious as covid during the pandemic.
